name: promote --explain tells the operator the change needs a reviewed pull request before it becomes official
command: ID=L561E04; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/acquire-technology-rules.sh" --technology Vue --project $ID --source-file g.txt --source-id s --now 2026-07-05T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/promote-project-rule.sh" --project $ID --namespace vue --plan --explain 2>&1 | grep -qE 'EXPLAIN:.*pull request.*reviewer approves'; rm -rf "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/_project/$ID && echo promote-explains-pr-gate 1>&2
